come from? Branding comes from cattle,
right? You sear a cattle with your brand
on it. You literally brand them.
And what is the point of that? The point
of that is to change someone else's
behavior. So if you have two cows, one
that has a brand and one doesn't, the
one that doesn't have a brand, you will
treat differently than the one that does
have a brand. The one that does have a
brand, you might return to its owner,
you might steal it, you might kill it,
depending on your relationship with the

the brand, right? You'll You'll behave

the point of a brand is to actually

do something when they see that and then
and behave accordingly. And so, the idea
